Another important problem faced by the users of Act! Is that these add-ons are bundled up with some unnecessary features, which means that people do not have the value for their money, as not all features can be utilized. Thus, the solution to these issues can be that Act! provides its users with free of cost add-ons or, if not free of cost, then at least it can make sure that the cost of most important and most demanded add-ons are reduced to an affordable level.

8. Albato: The most affordable pick at $15/month, with a clean UI and a custom app integrator.
9. n8n: Open-source, self-hostable, with visual building plus custom JavaScript and Python for technical teams.
10. Pabbly Connect: The value king, with free triggers, no feature gating, and a $349 lifetime deal option. [...] •

Tray landing page

Tray.ai is an AI orchestration platform that combines a traditional iPaaS with AI agent development and integration capabilities. Its Merlin Agent Builder allows teams to create intelligent agents that reason, act, and learn across connected systems, while its Agent Gateway enables the secure deployment of managed MCP servers. The platform features over 700 pre-built connectors, agent accelerators for IT and HR, and enterprise-grade governance including audit trails, guardrails, and role-based access control. Designed for large business and development teams, Tray focuses on scaling trusted AI agents and consolidating complex enterprise integrations into a single automated platform.

results.title: Simplify Your Workday: 9 Best Workflow Automation Apps · Activepieces
results.content:
New users can start with a two-week free trial to test syncing features before committing.

### 7. Kissflow

Image Source: kissflow.com

Kissflow is an automation platform with a drag-and-drop interface, so you can map steps like approvals, handoffs, and follow-ups in minutes. For example, an HR onboarding flow can start with a form, route approvals to the right people, then assign accounts and send day-one tasks.

It focuses on simple task automation and positions itself as an alternative to robotic process automation (RPA). You get a no-code builder for fast setup, plus low-code options when your IT team wants deeper control.
